title: build(deps): bump github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface from 0.5.3 to 0.5.4
body:
Bumps [github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface](https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface) from 0.5.3 to 0.5.4.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface's releases.

v0.5.4

What's Changed

  • Use current fsnotify library, drop viper dependency by @​liggitt in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#95
  • pkg/cdi: fix GetSpecErrors()/refresh read/write data race. by @​klihub in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#98
  • dependencies: update opencontainers packages (rebased #87) by @​klihub in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#100
  • fix cdi doc missing SpecDB() by @​moshe010 in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#96
  • cmd, pkg, schema: stop using github.com/pkg/errors. by @​klihub in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#99
  • Add functions to query and validate minimum spec version by @​elezar in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#93
  • cmd/cdi: split out to a go module of its own. by @​klihub in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#103
  • cmd/cdi: update/fix go.{mod,sum}. by @​klihub in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#106

New Contributors

  • @​liggitt made their first contribution in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#95
  • @​moshe010 made their first contribution in container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface#96

Full Changelog: https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/compare/v0.5.3...v0.5.4

Commits
  • 0a1a5be Merge pull request #106 from klihub/fixes/cmd-cdi-deps
  • ad5beee cmd/cdi: update/fix go.{mod,sum}.
  • 95791ea Merge pull request #103 from klihub/fixes/split-cdi-binary
  • 5b3b5d8 Merge pull request #93 from elezar/min-spec-version
  • cafeaf8 cmd/cdi: split out to a module of its own.
  • 1a1203c Add semver package to module
  • 801f1ad Set earliest supported spec verison to v0.3.0
  • 42cb494 Refactor version checks
  • 8729204 Add spec version validation
  • 893254c Add MinimumRequiredVersion function to spec
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body: Needs manual intervention.  I'll take a look.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dependabot[bot]*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@giuseppe can you take a look at the failure?  I am not familiar with this code.

it seems like a breaking change in the dependency, the first commits that breaks the test is:

```
commit 801f1ad87b98012473347ff8892bd8338768f0fb
Author: Evan Lezar <elezar@nvidia.com>
Date:   Wed Nov 9 12:08:34 2022 +0100

    Set earliest supported spec verison to v0.3.0
    
    Signed-off-by: Evan Lezar <elezar@nvidia.com>
```

so a `s/0.2.0/0.3.0/` in `test/e2e/cdi/device.json` seems to do the trick
